name: Xiangtan Electrochemical Scientific Ltd.
summary: Xiangtan Electrochemical Scientific Ltd. produces and sells electrolytic manganese dioxide (EMD) and new energy battery materials. The company offers C-Zn grade, alkaline grade, primary Li-MnO2 grade, and secondary Li-Mo grade EMD products. It also engages in urban sewage and industrial wastewater treatment activities, as well as provides related technical services. In addition, the company trades in ferromanganese alloys, electrolytic manganese metal, primary and secondary battery materials, manganese dioxide, manganese tetroxide, catalyst, discharge manganese, manganese carbonate ore, oxidized manganese ore, fund tray trading, etc. It also exports its products to approximately 20 countries, including the United States, Japan, the European Union, Southeast Asia, and internationally. Xiangtan Electrochemical Scientific Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is based in Xiangtan, China.
